# Templates Index

Use these templates to adapt the talk into your own production repositories.

## Recommended Templates

| Template | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `CLAUDE_MD_TEMPLATE.md` | Repo-level instructions for Claude Code |
| `PR_TEMPLATE_CLAUDE_ASSISTED.md` | PR evidence for Claude-assisted changes |
| `ROLLING_ADOPTION_SCORECARD.md` | Rollout readiness and adoption tracking |
| `SAFE_ASK_NEVER_POLICY.md` | Authority boundary policy |
| `ARCH_GATE_REVIEW_MODEL.md` | Review checklist for AI-generated diffs |

## Suggested Production Repo Files

```text
CLAUDE.md
.github/pull_request_template.md
CODEOWNERS
docs/architecture/boundaries.md
docs/security/pii-logging-policy.md
docs/runbooks/rollback.md
docs/prompts/plan-first.md
docs/training/reviewer-katas.md
```
